particulars.description: Hollymount, george street, clitheroe, lancashire BB7 1BU.

By way of legal mortgage, the property known as land and buildings lying north west of whitehall road, farnley, leeds and regisered at hm land registry under title number WYK463232 (the "property"). Notification of addition to or amendment of charge.
Fixed and floating charge over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future, including goodwill, book debts, uncalled capital, buildings, fixtures, fixed plant & machinery.
